title: Brazilian Green Bean Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy stir fry recipe with green beans and savory flavors, inspired by Brazilian cuisine.

ingredients.name: Savory stir fry sauce
ingredients.notes: Available at most grocery stores or online

ingredients.name: Brazilian seasoning blend
ingredients.notes: A mix of garlic, onion, and spices

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the green beans and cook for 3-4 minutes, or until they start to soften.
Add the Brazilian seasoning blend and stir-fry sauce, and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Add the crunchy chopped nuts and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Season with salt and pepper to taste, and serve hot.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional nuts if desired.
